pattern: Sliding window of length k on a circular array, counting positions where the window is fully alternating.
hints: Double the array to handle the circular wrap-around, then run a sliding window of size k.
Track a run length of consecutive alternating pairs; when the run reaches k-1 consecutive alternating pairs, the window of length k qualifies.
Whenever two adjacent tiles share the same color, the run resets to 1 (only the current pair is alternating).

edge_inputs.description: perfectly alternating, k equals array length
wrap-around provides the only valid window
k equals n — exactly one window
double break in middle resets two windows
minimum k=3, minimum length n=3, fully alternating

stress.description: random circular binary arrays with random k
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(3, size)
    colors = [rng.randint(0, 1) for _ in range(n)]
    k = rng.randint(3, n)
    return [colors, k]
